flags.label: In-state tuition
flags.summary: In-state tuition at Southwestern Oregon Community College rose 12% between 2021 and 2024 ($6.4k → $7.2k).

flags.label: Out-of-state tuition
flags.summary: Out-of-state tuition at Southwestern Oregon Community College rose 12% between 2021 and 2024 ($6.4k → $7.2k).

flags.label: 3-year cohort default rate
flags.summary: 3-year cohort default rate at Southwestern Oregon Community College fell 100% between 2021 and 2024 (4.1% → 0.0%).

flags.label: 150%-time completion
flags.summary: 150%-time completion at Southwestern Oregon Community College rose 69% between 2006 and 2009 (11.4% → 19.3%).
